product_data.Features: 65-inch OLED evo panel, 4K 120Hz, Dolby Vision IQ, Dolby Atmos, webOS 23, Game Optimizer with 4x HDMI 2.1 ports, AI Picture Pro

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: Hello! I'm very interested in the LG C3 65-inch OLED TV you have listed. It looks like a fantastic set. I was wondering if there might be any flexibility on the price?

conversation_history.speaker: Seller
conversation_history.message: I'm glad to hear you're interested in the LG C3 65-inch OLED TV! It's definitely a top-of-the-line TV. While I can't go below the wholesale price of $1,100, I can offer you a special price of $1,600. How does that sound to you?

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: Thank you for the offer. The LG C3 sounds fantastic, but $1,600 is a bit more than I was hoping to spend. Would you be able to do $1,350?

conversation_history.speaker: Seller
conversation_history.message: I appreciate your interest in the LG C3. Since you seem really interested, I can meet you halfway at $1,500. Would that work for you?

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: I appreciate you meeting me in the middle, but $1,500 is still just a bit too high for my budget. I'm afraid I can't afford that price.

conversation_history.speaker: Seller
conversation_history.message: I completely understand your budget constraints. Since I can't go below the wholesale price, I respect your decision. If you ever reconsider or have any questions in the future, feel free to reach out.

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: I understand. Thank you for your time. Unfortunately, I cannot afford it at that price.
